title: Dork Create Cobblemon
description: Private Cobblemon modpack for use with my friend group.
body:
Dork Create Cobblemon is a laid-back, lightweight Cobblemon-focused modpack with automation elements thanks to Create and a few of its addons. Choose a starter, gather your friends, and go on a Cobblemon journey together!

- Various Cobblemon addons to improve your experience

- Automate the production of Pokeballs and Potions with Create: Klinks and Klangs

- Grow and cook delicious meals with Farmer's Delight

- Store your items with Resource Backpacks, because no trainer is complete without their trainer bag

- More to come as this modpack evolves to me and my friends' needs.

This modpack is primarily made for a private server for my friends. I'm still an amateur so there may be bugs here and there. Keep that in mind if you decide to use this modpack yourself!
